sample_requests: Load Franzosa 2019 IBD paired data, filter to top 150 microbes and top 200 annotated metabolites, run Spearman + CCA + MMvec, list top-10 pairs from each
Validate MMvec on synthetic paired data with 5 planted producer-pairs and confirm planted pairs rank above random
Plot the joint microbe + metabolite embedding biplot from a fitted MMvec at latent components (0, 1)
For a chosen microbe return the conditional probability over metabolites with mmvec.conditional_probabilities()
Decide between Spearman, CCA, and MMvec given a 165-sample paired cohort

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/micro/_pair.py. Franzosa 2019 ingest + MMvec training (~5 min on CPU) is the canonical smoke target; simulate_paired + MMvec + Spearman is a second-tier acceptance probe. No live smoke run executed.
